ticks.reason: Holiday sentinel tick. No new escalation. WTI flat ~$104.35. Ceasefire nominally intact despite violations. Bab el-Mandeb threatened but not closed. No US strike on Iran.
ticks.details: WTI $104.35-104.56 (flat). US blockade of Iranian ports ongoing (no new military action). Bab el-Mandeb open. Apr 15 preview: F&O expiry + Reliance Q4 post-market (PAT est Rs 19,200-21,000 cr, dividend likely). Gap open risk from 2-day holiday overhang.

ticks.reason: Holiday sentinel. WTI pulled back to $97.22 (down ~$7 from $104.35). 2nd-round US-Iran talks being explored; ceasefire nominally holds to Apr 22. De-escalation signal. No new kinetic action.
ticks.details: WTI $97.22 (range $92-98 today). Ceasefire holds Apr 22 technical deadline. No US strike, no Bab el-Mandeb closure. Updated scenarios on dashboard: Hormuz tense $95-110 = 65% dominant, ceasefire reversal 15%. Positive for Apr 15 open vs earlier fears.
